introSection: Big Dipper was a steel roller coaster located at Curry's Fun Park Portrush in Portrush, Antrim, Northern Ireland, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was known as Barry's Big Dipper from opening until 2022. It was renamed Big Dipper as part of the rebranding of the park, formerly known as Barry's Amusements. It was dismantled in January 2023. This was the only coaster with an inversion in Northern Ireland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had a single tall vertical loop.

fullText:
Big Dipper was a steel roller coaster located at Curry's Fun Park Portrush in Portrush, Antrim, Northern Ireland, UK.

The ride was known as Barry's Big Dipper from opening until 2022. It was renamed Big Dipper as part of the rebranding of the park, formerly known as Barry's Amusements. It was dismantled in January 2023. This was the only coaster with an inversion in Northern Ireland.

The ride had a single tall vertical loop.
